title: Leading Through Code Reviews
content: Code review is one of the highest leverage habits for senior engineers. It improves quality and develops team judgment over time.
I focus comments on intent, readability, and maintainability before micro-optimizations. This keeps reviews aligned with long-term value.
A good review highlights what is strong, not only what should change. Balanced feedback keeps collaboration healthy and productive.
For platform work, review standards should emphasize API clarity and migration impact. Small API decisions can affect many teams.
